title: Romeo and Juliet
author: Shakespeare, William
summary: Two noble households, the Capulets and Montagues, feud in Verona, corrupting public peace. Amid street brawls and princely warnings, young Romeo Montague laments unrequited love until he and Juliet Capulet, a not-yet-fourteen daughter, meet at a masked feast and instantly fall into fatal passion. Their secret vows and Friar Lawrence’s fragile plans aim to reconcile families, but mischance and escalating reprisals threaten all. The Chorus proclaims that the ‘star-cross’d’ pair’s misadventures culminate in their deaths, whose tragic end ultimately silences their parents’ rage. The play explores love, youthful folly, family rivalry, and the consequences of entrenched vendetta and societal costs.
